prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I cannot predict future stock prices with certainty. This prediction is a statistical projection based on a simplified Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, commonly used for stock price modeling. It assumes that stock price changes follow a log-normal distribution. For this calculation, I've used general market parameters rather than specific historical REGN data (which I do not fetch in real-time). I assumed an average daily drift (expected return) of 0.05% and a daily volatility of 2%. The point estimate is the median of the projected log-normal distribution. These are theoretical values, and actual market performance can vary significantly due to unpredictable factors like company news, market sentiment, economic data, and geopolitical events. Investors should conduct their own research and consider professional financial advice.
